name: ghostvest-tee-crypto
description: GhostVest 密码学内核 - 隐身地址推导 (Python/TS 双端一致)

scripts.generate:vectors: cd ../backend && python -c "from app.crypto_utils import *; vectors = generate_cross_validation_vectors(100); save_test_vectors(vectors, '../tee_crypto/test_vectors.json')"
scripts.test:cross: npm run generate:vectors && vitest run stealth.test.ts -t 'Python 交叉验证'
